ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` --no-preserve= option Do not preserve the specified attributes.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not preserve the specified attributes.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` --parents option Form the name of each destination file by appending to the target directory a slash and the specified name of the source file.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Form the name of each destination file by appending to the target directory a slash and the specified name of the source file.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -r option Copy directories recursively.
The `cp invocation` --reflink[= option Perform a lightweight, copy-on-write (COW) copy, if supported by the file system.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Perform a lightweight, copy-on-write (COW) copy, if supported by the file system.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` --remove-destination option Remove each existing destination file before attempting to open it (contrast with -f above).
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Remove each existing destination file before attempting to open it (contrast with -f above).

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` --sparse= option A sparse file contains holes – a sequence of zero bytes that does not occupy any file system blocks; the ‘ read ’ system call reads these as zeros.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: A sparse file contains holes – a sequence of zero bytes that does not occupy any file system blocks; the ‘ read ’ system call reads these as zeros.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` --strip-trailing-slashes option Remove any trailing slashes from each source argument.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Remove any trailing slashes from each source argument.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -s option Make symbolic links instead of copies of non-directories.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Make symbolic links instead of copies of non-directories.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -S option Append suffix to each backup file made with -b .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Append suffix to each backup file made with -b .

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -t option Specify the destination directory .
The `cp invocation` -T option Do not treat the last operand specially when it is a directory or a symbolic link to a directory.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not treat the last operand specially when it is a directory or a symbolic link to a directory.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -u option Do not copy a non-directory that has an existing destination with the same or newer modification timestamp; instead, silently skip the file without failing.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Do not copy a non-directory that has an existing destination with the same or newer modification timestamp; instead, silently skip the file without failing.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -fail option This is similar to ‘ none ’, in that no files in the destination are replaced, but any skipped files are diagnosed and induce a failure.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: This is similar to ‘ none ’, in that no files in the destination are replaced, but any skipped files are diagnosed and induce a failure.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -v option Print the name of each file before copying it.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Print the name of each file before copying it.

ir_specs.statement: The `cp invocation` -x option Skip subdirectories that are on different file systems from the one that the copy started on.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Skip subdirectories that are on different file systems from the one that the copy started on.
